title: dryopteris serra
intro: Dryopteris serra, also known as the serrated wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris serra include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support digestive health, alleviate menstrual cramps, and reduce stress.
